en.extract:
The scrub honeyeater (Meliphaga albonotata) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found across New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''scrub honeyeater''' ('''''Meliphaga albonotata''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]]. It is found across [[New Guinea]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Scrub Honeyeater (Meliphaga albonotata) |url=https://ebird.org/species/scrhon1 |access-date=2026-04-14 |website=eBird |publisher=Cornell Lab of Ornithology}}</ref>
